user.title: KONTINUUM Setup
user.description: KONTINUUM learns your home's patterns and predicts what happens next. Choose a personality that determines how fast the system learns and acts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: KONTINUUM includes a brain visualization dashboard. If enabled, it will be auto-installed and accessible via the sidebar.

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Personality, operation mode, tracking and general options.

data.home_only_mode: Home-Only Mode (pause when nobody is home)

cortex.title: Cortex (LLM Agents)
cortex.description: Enable Cortex for LLM-powered multi-agent decisions. Sequential mode queries agents one-by-one (recommended for single GPU).

agents_overview.title: Cortex – Agent Overview
agents_overview.description: Manage your LLM agents. Agents are preserved until you explicitly remove them.

agent_setup.title: Cortex – Agent {slot} (Connection)
agent_setup.description: Choose a role and provider. For Ollama just enter the host (e.g. 'localhost' or '192.168.1.100') – http:// and port 11434 are added automatically.

error.ollama_unreachable: Cannot reach Ollama at this address. Check if Ollama is running and the URL is correct.
